label: Intermediary Governance Overlay
description: TSMM-native overlay for governing AI intermediaries that transform or mediate commons material.

nodes.label: Intermediary governance domain
nodes.description: Domain where intermediaries shape access to commons material.

nodes.label: Commons governance authority
nodes.description: Defines the governance conditions for mediation.

nodes.label: Intermediary service
nodes.description: Service that ranks, summarizes, or synthesizes source material.

nodes.label: Intermediary governance policy
nodes.description: Requires provenance, attribution, fidelity, and redress.

nodes.label: Transformation trace evidence
nodes.description: Records source, transformation, and output binding.

nodes.label: Transformation admissibility decision
nodes.description: Determines whether the mediated output is admissible.

nodes.label: Visibility and use effect
nodes.description: Allows, labels, restricts, or routes for review.

edges.description: Commons authority defines the governance policy.
Decision governs whether mediated output may be used.
Downstream consumer relies on the enforced outcome.
